data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of a broad trough of low pressure, there will be occasional showers and thunderstorms over the coast of Guangdong in the next couple of days. With the trough of low pressure weakening midweek next week, showers will ease off over the region. An anticyclone aloft is expected to cover Guangdong gradually in the latter part of next week. The weather will be fine and it will become very hot over southern China.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260718","week":"Saturday","forecastWind":"South to southwest force 4, occasionally force 5 offshore at first.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with occasional showers. Showers will be heavy at times with squally thunderstorms at first.
